items.name: ⚙️ Obsidian Drifter Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Wander the ruins in style with the Obsidian Drifter Coat, a battle-worn trench infused with futuristic grit. Its dark metallic finish and rugged silhouette make it perfect for those who live on the edge of chaos and technology.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
🖤 Matte-black metallic texture with weathered details
⚙️ Heavy layered design for a strong and tactical presence
✨ PBR materials add depth, realism, and shine
🔩 Ideal for mercenaries, pilots, or cyberpunk outlaws
🔍 Keywords: black, coat, cyberpunk, rogue, trench, futuristic, armor, drifter, PBR, Roblox
Rule the night, roam the wastelands —
the Obsidian Drifter Coat is your armor of survival. 🌑

PBR finish enhances subtle fabric gradients
🔍 Keywords: coat, red, long, gothic, elegant, warden, formal, noble, fantasy, PBR

items.name: 🔥 Blazing Commander Coat [PBR]

Lead your squad through the flames in the Blazing Commander Coat — a bold black-and-gold uniform ignited with crimson fire patterns. Perfect for those who thrive in the heat of battle and command with burning determination.
💡 Why You’ll Love It

⚜️ Gold-trimmed detailing for a powerful, refined finish

💥 Ideal for fire mages, commanders, or elite fighters
🔍 Keywords: fire, coat, commander, black, red, gold, flame, soldier, mage, PBR, Roblox

the Blazing Commander Coat burns with unstoppable energy. 🔥⚔️

items.name: Ivory Ronin Coat [PBR]
items.description:
✨⚔️ Pure elegance with a warrior’s soul.
This refined ivory coat blends ceremonial beauty with a battle-ready silhouette. Soft off-white fabric is accented by muted gold trims and layered folds, while the tied belt and blade detail add a subtle ronin-inspired edge—perfect for noble fighters, sages, or elite NPCs.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Elegant ivory color with gold-accent detailing
Flowing layered design that looks natural in motion
Balanced mix of ceremonial, fantasy, and samurai aesthetics
Ideal for roleplay, RPG worlds, and premium avatar outfits
🔍 Keywords: robe, ronin coat, samurai outfit, fantasy clothing, ivory robe, warrior outfit, elegant coat, rpg outfit, anime style, roblox clothes
Graceful, powerful, and timeless—this piece elevates any avatar instantly.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
